description:
You are a compliance analyst who has just received a raw transaction export and must prepare an
  auditable trail for an upcoming review.

  1. A CSV file already exists at  
     /home/user/data/transactions.csv

  2. Your job is to:
     a. Find every row whose “status” column is either **FAILED** or **PENDING**.  
     b. Convert only those matching rows into **one** prettified JSON array (two-space
        indentation) and write the result to  
        /home/user/compliance/pending_failed_transactions.json  
        (create the directory if it does not exist).  
        •  The keys/field order in each JSON object **must be**:  
          transaction_id, account_id, amount, currency, status  
        •  Amounts must remain numeric (no quotes).  
        •  The JSON array must be formatted exactly as in the example below, including
          new-lines and spaces, so automated grading can diff it byte-for-byte.

        Example of required formatting (values are illustrative — use the real data from the CSV):
        [
          {
            "transaction_id": "T0001",
            "account_id": "AC000",
            "amount": 123.45,
            "currency": "USD",
            "status": "FAILED"
          }
        ]

     c. Append (create if necessary) a plain-text audit log at  
        /home/user/compliance/audit_log.txt  
        The log entry must be *exactly* (including case, spacing, and the newline at the end):

        Generated pending_failed_transactions.json with 3 entries

        Do **not** add a date/time stamp or any other characters.

  3. When you are finished, there should be exactly two new artefacts inside
     /home/user/compliance/ :
        • pending_failed_transactions.json  
        • audit_log.txt (containing the single line shown above)

  No other files should be created or modified.
truth:
Initial file that already exists when the scenario starts:
    Path: /home/user/data/transactions.csv
    Contents:
      transaction_id,account_id,amount,currency,status
      T1001,AC245,250.00,USD,COMPLETED
      T1002,AC367,1450.50,USD,PENDING
      T1003,AC578,322.10,EUR,FAILED
      T1004,AC245,78.45,USD,COMPLETED
      T1005,AC367,2300.00,USD,FAILED

  Expected artefacts after the agent finishes:

    1. /home/user/compliance/pending_failed_transactions.json  
       Exact byte-for-byte contents (including final newline):
[
  {
    "transaction_id": "T1002",
    "account_id": "AC367",
    "amount": 1450.50,
    "currency": "USD",
    "status": "PENDING"
  },
  {
    "transaction_id": "T1003",
    "account_id": "AC578",
    "amount": 322.10,
    "currency": "EUR",
    "status": "FAILED"
  },
  {
    "transaction_id": "T1005",
    "account_id": "AC367",
    "amount": 2300.00,
    "currency": "USD",
    "status": "FAILED"
  }
]

    2. /home/user/compliance/audit_log.txt  
       Exact byte-for-byte contents (including final newline):
Generated pending_failed_transactions.json with 3 entries
name: task_000000_46c1cf12
